common.timeClashBody: You can't place "{{a}}" ({{aTime}}) before "{{b}}" ({{bTime}}) — change one of their times if you want to reorder them.

notRegistered.title: Access restricted
notRegistered.body: You are not registered to use this application. Contact the app administrator to request access.
notRegistered.helpTitle: If you believe this is an error, you can:
notRegistered.help1: Verify you are logged in with the correct account
notRegistered.help2: Contact the app administrator for access
notRegistered.help3: Try logging out and back in again

syncIndicator.allUpToDate: All data is up to date

slide0.title:
Tell us a bit
about yourself
slide0.subtitle: Help us get to know you better so we can offer you a personalized experience.
slide0.usernameTaken: This @username is already taken, try another one
slide0.fillAll: Fill in all fields to continue
slide0.termsPrefix: I have read and accept the
slide0.termsRequired: You need to accept the Terms and Privacy Policy to continue

slide1.title:
Tell us a bit
about yourself
slide1.subtitle: This information is used to calculate visa requirements, mandatory vaccines and consular information when you're abroad.
slide1.residenceHint: Currency is automatically detected from your country.
slide1.secondPassportHint: If you have two passports, Kōdo compares them to make visa processing easier.

slide2.title:
Your trip,
one place
slide2.subtitle: Invite your companions to the trip. Everyone will have access to the same information: route, documents, spots and expenses.

slide3.title:
All set before
you take off
slide3.subtitle: Kōdo gives you personalized info: visas, vaccines, adapters. Upload your documents and assign them to a specific day so they appear exactly when you need them.

slide4.title:
Expenses always
add up here
slide4.subtitle: Track who pays and who splits each expense. Kōdo keeps the balances and everyone knows exactly what they owe at the end.

slide5.title:
Your day-to-day
in the Today tab
slide5.subtitle: Everything you upload and prepare generates your daily itinerary. The Today tab shows you the weather, day's documents and your spots.

s3.body: Invite your companions to the trip. Everyone gets access to the same information: route, documents, spots and expenses.

s4.body: Kōdo gives you personalised information: visas, vaccines, adapters. Upload your documents and assign them to a specific day so they show up when you need them.

s5.body: Note who paid and who's splitting each expense. Kōdo keeps track of the balances so everyone knows exactly what they owe at the end.

s6.body: Everything you upload and prepare builds your daily itinerary. The Today tab shows you the weather, the day's documents and your spots. Search restaurants, museums or any plan, and assign them a day and time so they show up exactly when you need them.
s6.restaurantSub: Restaurant · no time · tap to add
